mousee.config.title: Mousee
mousee.config.category.diagnostics.descr: These options keep normal gameplay quiet by default and are only intended for troubleshooting.
mousee.config.inactive.not_macos: Mousee is inactive on this platform (%s). Its gameplay integration only runs on macOS.
mousee.config.inactive.no_ingame_options: No Mousee in-game options are exposed here on non-macOS platforms.
mousee.config.option.diagnostics_enabled: Logs native backend initialization, mouse detection, and backend support summaries.
mousee.config.option.log_state_transitio: Logs when Mousee switches between inactive and gameplay-relative input states.
mousee.config.option.sample_motion_loggi: Every two seconds, logs a representative raw motion sample while relative mouse input is active.
